title: GC GAVENO CAVAILIA Duck Feather Pillows 2 Pack - Hotel Quality Standard Size Down Pillows - Medium Firm Head & Neck Support Bed Pillow, White, 48x74 Cm
features: HIGH QUALITY DUCK DOWN PILLOWS 2 PACK NATURAL-FILLED: 85% feather and 15% down; filler is naturally captured. It is breathable and fluffy for improved sleep. It can absorb moisture and is appropriate for all seasons.
EASY CARE ANTI-SNORE FIRM PILLOWS: Our pillows are easy to keep as clean as new with a simple machine wash in the gentle cycle with cold water.
DUCK FEATHER AND DOWN PILLOWS FIRM SUPPORT RELAXED SLEEPING: The feeling of sleeping with a premium quality soft duck down pillow can’t compare to any of your previous sleeping experiences.

SOFT FEATHER PILLOWS 2 PACK LUXURY PERFECT FOR ALL POSITIONS: These medium density pillows are specially designed to provide comfort to your head and neck with gentle support, making it ideal for all types of sleepers.
As we Evolve, our homes should too. To make your home as comfortable as attractive, please visit the Amazon Official GC GAVENO CAVAILIA store.
